title: Shielding visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Shielding_Visor.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Brianna]] wearing a shielding visor]]
The '''shielding visor''' was a blast visor considered by many to be an essential equipment item for spacefarers in the days of the [[Old Sith Wars]]. It provided the wearer with some protection from various energy-based attacks.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
